[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] ''' Kohrin''' was an [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] in command of at least two [[Fleet/Legends|fleets]].

==History==
Kohrin used the [[Enforcer (Executor-class)|''Enforcer'']] as his [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]]. When it and his [[Admiral Kohrin's second fleet|second fleet]] were attacked near [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] forces led by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], it looked like he was going to lose the battle until [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] reinforcements arrived.

Once Skywalker's forces had been forced to withdraw, Kohrin sent the ''Enforcer'' to [[Phaylenn]] to be repaired and took revenge by attacking what he thought was a Rebel base on [[Ahlenn]] with the remainder of his fleet. What he did not know, however, was that the base had been abandoned by the Rebels two [[Standard month/Legends|months]] previously.
